sentences.sentence: Forests are one of the main elements of our natural heritage.
sentences.translation: 森林是我们自然遗产的主要组成部分之一。

structure.text: one of the main elements of our natural heritage

difficult_points: one of the main elements 表示“主要组成部分之一”，elements 用复数。
are 后接名词短语作主语补语，说明 forests 的身份。

sentences.sentence: The decline of Europe's forests over the last decade and a half has led to an increasing awareness and understanding of the serious imbalances which threaten them.
sentences.translation: 过去十五年间欧洲森林的衰退，使人们越来越意识到并理解那些威胁森林的严重失衡。

structure.text: The decline of Europe's forests over the last decade and a half
an increasing awareness and understanding of the serious imbalances

difficult_points: over the last decade and a half 是现在完成时的时间范围，指过去十五年。
which 引导定语从句修饰 imbalances，them 指代 Europe's forests。

expressions.meaning_zh: 日益增强的认识和理解

sentences.sentence: European countries are becoming increasingly concerned by major threats to European forests, threats which know no frontiers other than those of geography or climate: air pollution, soil deterioration, the increasing number of forest fires and sometimes even the mismanagement of our woodland and forest heritage.
sentences.translation: 欧洲各国越来越担心对欧洲森林构成的重大威胁；这些威胁除了地理或气候界限外不受国界限制，包括空气污染、土壤退化、森林火灾增多，有时甚至还有对林地和森林遗产的管理不善。

structure.text: by major threats to European forests
threats which know no frontiers other than those of geography or climate
which know no frontiers other than those of geography or climate
air pollution, soil deterioration, the increasing number of forest fires and sometimes even the mismanagement of our woodland and forest heritage

difficult_points: threats which... 是同位语并由 which 引导定语从句，补充说明 threats 的性质。
know no frontiers 意为“不受任何边界限制”，冒号后列出具体威胁。
other than those 中 those 代替 frontiers，避免重复。

sentences.sentence: There has been a growing awareness of the need for countries to get together to co-ordinate their policies.
sentences.translation: 人们越来越认识到，各国有必要联合起来协调政策。

structure.text: of the need for countries to get together to co-ordinate their policies

difficult_points: There has been 是存在句，真正主语是 a growing awareness。
for countries to get together 是带逻辑主语的非谓语结构，说明 need 的具体内容。

sentences.sentence: In December 1990, Strasbourg hosted the first Ministerial Conference on the protection of Europe's forests.
sentences.translation: 1990年12月，斯特拉斯堡举办了首届欧洲森林保护部长级会议。

structure.text: the first Ministerial Conference on the protection of Europe's forests

difficult_points: host 在这里是动词，表示“主办”，不是名词“主人”。
on the protection of Europe's forests 修饰 Conference，说明会议主题。

sentences.sentence: The conference brought together 31 countries from both Western and Eastern Europe.
sentences.translation: 这次会议汇聚了来自西欧和东欧的31个国家。

structure.text: from both Western and Eastern Europe

difficult_points: bring together 是短语动词，表示“召集、汇聚”，不是字面上的“带到一起”。
from both... 修饰 countries，both 连接两个并列地区。

sentences.sentence: The topics discussed included the co-ordinated study of the destruction of forests, as well as how to combat forest fires and the extension of European research programs on the forest ecosystem.
sentences.translation: 讨论的主题包括协调研究森林破坏、如何应对森林火灾，以及扩大欧洲森林生态系统研究项目。

structure.text: the co-ordinated study of the destruction of forests
the extension of European research programs on the forest ecosystem

difficult_points: discussed 是过去分词后置修饰 topics，等于 topics which were discussed。
included 后并列三个内容，how to combat 是“如何应对”的疑问词+不定式结构。

sentences.sentence: The preparatory work for the conference had been undertaken at two meetings of experts.
sentences.translation: 会议的筹备工作是在两次专家会议上完成的。

structure.text: The preparatory work for the conference

difficult_points: had been undertaken 是过去完成时被动语态，表示在会议召开前已经完成。
for the conference 修饰 preparatory work，说明筹备工作的对象。

sentences.sentence: Their initial task was to decide which of the many forest problems of concern to Europe involved the largest number of countries and might be the subject of joint action.
sentences.translation: 他们最初的任务是确定：欧洲众多森林问题中，哪些涉及最多国家、可能成为联合行动的主题。

structure.text: which of the many forest problems of concern to Europe involved the largest number of countries and might be the subject of joint action
involved the largest number of countries
might be the subject of joint action

difficult_points: to decide 后接 which 引导的宾语从句，which 指“哪些森林问题”。
of concern to Europe 后置修饰 forest problems；involved 与 might be 并列作从句谓语。

expressions.text: be the subject of joint action

sentences.sentence: Those confined to particular geographical areas, such as countries bordering the Mediterranean or the Nordic countries therefore had to be discarded.
sentences.translation: 因此，那些局限于特定地理区域的问题，例如地中海沿岸国家或北欧国家所面对的问题，只能被舍弃。

structure.text: Those confined to particular geographical areas
such as countries bordering the Mediterranean or the Nordic countries

difficult_points: Those confined... 中 those 指前文的 forest problems，confined 是过去分词后置修饰。
bordering the Mediterranean 修饰 countries；had to be discarded 是“不得不被舍弃”的被动结构。

sentences.sentence: However, this does not mean that in future they will be ignored.
sentences.translation: 不过，这并不意味着今后会忽视这些问题。

structure.text: that in future they will be ignored

difficult_points: this 指前一句舍弃地域性问题这一做法，而不是单个名词。
that 从句说明 mean 的具体内容，they 指这些地域性森林问题。

sentences.sentence: As a whole, European countries see forests as performing a triple function: biological, economic and recreational.
sentences.translation: 总体而言，欧洲各国认为森林发挥着生物、经济和休闲三重功能。
difficult_points: see A as doing 是“认为A正在发挥……”的结构，as performing 作宾语补语。
冒号后的三个形容词并列说明 triple function 的具体类型。

sentences.sentence: The first is to act as a 'green lung' for our planet; by means of photosynthesis, forests produce oxygen through the transformation of solar energy, thus fulfilling what for humans is the essential role of an immense, non-polluting power plant.
sentences.translation: 第一种功能是充当地球的“绿色肺”；森林通过光合作用把太阳能转化，产生氧气，从而履行对人类而言相当于巨大无污染发电厂的基本作用。

structure.text: to act as a 'green lung' for our planet
through the transformation of solar energy
thus fulfilling what for humans is the essential role of an immense, non-polluting power plant
what for humans is the essential role of an immense, non-polluting power plant

difficult_points: 分号连接两个相关分句；by means of 和 through 都是介词短语，说明方式。
thus fulfilling 是结果性分词结构，what 引导名词性从句作 fulfilling 的宾语。
what for humans is... 中 what 相当于“……的事物/作用”，不是疑问词。

sentences.sentence: At the same time, forests provide raw materials for human activities through their constantly renewed production of wood.
sentences.translation: 与此同时，森林通过不断再生的木材产出，为人类活动提供原材料。

structure.text: through their constantly renewed production of wood

difficult_points: constantly renewed 是过去分词短语，修饰 production，强调木材产出持续更新。
through... 表示提供原材料的途径，而不是时间。

sentences.sentence: Finally, they offer those condemned to spend five days a week in an urban environment an unrivalled area of freedom to unwind and take part in a range of leisure activities, such as hunting, riding and hiking.
sentences.translation: 最后，森林为那些每周五天被困在城市环境中的人提供一片无可比拟的自由空间，让他们放松并参加狩猎、骑马、徒步等各种休闲活动。

structure.text: those condemned to spend five days a week in an urban environment
condemned to spend five days a week in an urban environment
to unwind and take part in a range of leisure activities
such as hunting, riding and hiking

difficult_points: offer 使用双宾语，those 是间接宾语，an unrivalled area 是直接宾语。
condemned to spend 是过去分词，带有“被迫长时间待在城市”的意味；to unwind 与 take part 并列。

sentences.sentence: The economic importance of forests has been understood since the dawn of man - wood was the first fuel.
sentences.translation: 自人类诞生以来，人们就认识到森林的经济重要性——木材曾是最早的燃料。
difficult_points: has been understood 是现在完成时被动语态，since 表示认识从过去延续到现在。
破折号后是对经济重要性的具体解释，wood 是第二个分句的主语。

sentences.sentence: The other aspects have been recognised only for a few centuries but they are becoming more and more important.
sentences.translation: 其他方面直到近几个世纪才得到承认，但它们正变得越来越重要。

structure.text: have been recognised only for a few centuries
are becoming more and more important

difficult_points: have been recognised 表示被认识到的状态持续至今。
but 连接两个完整分句，they 指代前面的 other aspects。

sentences.sentence: Hence, there is a real concern throughout Europe about the damage to the forest environment which threatens these three basic roles.
sentences.translation: 因此，整个欧洲都真正担心森林环境遭受破坏，而这种破坏会威胁这三项基本功能。

structure.text: about the damage to the forest environment
which threatens these three basic roles

difficult_points: there is 结构中真正主语是 a real concern。
which 修饰 damage（或整个 damage to environment），these three roles 指前文三重功能。

sentences.sentence: The myth of the 'natural' forest has survived, yet there are effectively no remaining 'primary' forests in Europe.
sentences.translation: “天然”森林的神话一直流传至今，但实际上欧洲已没有剩余的“原始”森林。

structure.text: effectively no remaining 'primary' forests in Europe

difficult_points: yet 表示转折，前半句说神话延续，后半句给出与之相反的事实。
there are 结构的真正主语是 no remaining primary forests。

sentences.sentence: All European forests are artificial, having been adapted and exploited by man for thousands of years.
sentences.translation: 欧洲所有森林都是人工形成的，因为它们几千年来一直被人类改造和开发。

structure.text: having been adapted and exploited by man for thousands of years

difficult_points: having been adapted and exploited 是完成时被动分词，表示先于主句且持续很久的改造。
by man 指动作执行者，adapted 与 exploited 并列。

sentences.sentence: This means that a forest policy is vital, that it must transcend national frontiers and generations of people, and that it must allow for the inevitable changes that take place in the forests, in needs, and hence in policy.
sentences.translation: 这意味着森林政策至关重要；它必须超越国界和世代，并考虑森林、需求以及由此产生的政策中不可避免的变化。

structure.text: that a forest policy is vital
that it must transcend national frontiers and generations of people
that it must allow for the inevitable changes
that take place in the forests, in needs, and hence in policy

difficult_points: means 后并列三个 that 从句，分别说明政策的重要性、范围和应对变化的要求。
最后一个 that 引导定语从句修饰 changes，hence in policy 表示前面变化最终影响政策。

sentences.sentence: The Strasbourg conference was one of the first events on such a scale to reach this conclusion.
sentences.translation: 斯特拉斯堡会议是最早得出这一结论的同等规模活动之一。

structure.text: one of the first events on such a scale

difficult_points: one of the first events 后接不定式 to reach，说明这些活动所做的动作。
on such a scale 修饰 events，指规模如此之大的活动。

sentences.sentence: A general declaration was made that 'a central place in any ecologically coherent forest policy must be given to continuity over time and to the possible effects of unforeseen events, to ensure that the full potential of these forests is maintained'.
sentences.translation: 会议发表了一项总声明，指出任何生态上协调一致的森林政策都必须把长期连续性以及未预见事件可能造成的影响置于核心位置，以确保这些森林的全部潜力得到维护。

structure.text: that 'a central place in any ecologically coherent forest policy must be given to continuity over time and to the possible effects of unforeseen events
in any ecologically coherent forest policy
to ensure that the full potential of these forests is maintained
that the full potential of these forests is maintained

difficult_points: was made that... 是被动表达，that 从句给出声明内容。
must be given to... 是被动结构，give place to 表示“给予……核心位置”。
to ensure that... 表示目的，maintained 是被动语态。

sentences.sentence: That general declaration was accompanied by six detailed resolutions to assist national policy-making.
sentences.translation: 这项总声明还配有六项详细决议，以协助各国制定政策。
difficult_points: was accompanied by 是被动结构，表示“由……伴随/配套”。
to assist 表示六项决议的目的，policy-making 是动名词复合名词。

sentences.sentence: The first proposes the extension and systematisation of surveillance sites to monitor forest decline.
sentences.translation: 第一项决议提议扩大并系统化监测站点，以监测森林衰退。

structure.text: the extension and systematisation of surveillance sites

difficult_points: the first 省略了 resolution，指第一项决议。
to monitor 表示建立监测站点的目的，extension 与 systematisation 并列。

sentences.sentence: Forest decline is still poorly understood but leads to the loss of a high proportion of a tree's needles or leaves.
sentences.translation: 人们对森林衰退的了解仍然不足，但它会导致树木大量针叶或叶片脱落。

structure.text: the loss of a high proportion of a tree's needles or leaves

difficult_points: is poorly understood 是被动语态，表示“尚未被充分理解”。
but 后省略了主语 Forest decline；a high proportion of 表示很大比例。

sentences.sentence: The entire continent and the majority of species are now affected: between 30% and 50% of the tree population.
sentences.translation: 如今整个欧洲大陆和大多数树种都受到影响：涉及树木总量的30%至50%。

structure.text: The entire continent and the majority of species
between 30% and 50% of the tree population

difficult_points: 主语由 the entire continent 与 the majority of species 并列构成，因此谓语用复数。
冒号后是比例补充说明，省略了“affected 的比例”这样的重复表达。

sentences.sentence: The condition appears to result from the cumulative effect of a number of factors, with atmospheric pollutants the principal culprits.
sentences.translation: 这种状况似乎源于多种因素累积产生的影响，其中大气污染物是主要元凶。

structure.text: the cumulative effect of a number of factors
with atmospheric pollutants the principal culprits

difficult_points: appear to result from 表示“似乎由……造成”，to result 是不定式。
with atmospheric pollutants... 是 with 独立结构，补充说明污染物的作用。

sentences.sentence: Compounds of nitrogen and sulphur dioxide should be particularly closely watched.
sentences.translation: 应当特别密切地监测氮化合物和二氧化硫。

structure.text: Compounds of nitrogen and sulphur dioxide

difficult_points: should be watched 是情态动词加被动语态，表示建议或必要性。
particularly closely 两个副词共同修饰 watched，强调监测程度。

sentences.sentence: However, their effects are probably accentuated by climatic factors, such as drought and hard winters, or soil imbalances such as soil acidification, which damages the roots.
sentences.translation: 不过，它们的影响可能会因气候因素（如干旱和严寒冬季）或土壤失衡（如土壤酸化）而加剧，而土壤酸化会损害树根。

structure.text: by climatic factors, such as drought and hard winters, or soil imbalances such as soil acidification
such as drought and hard winters

difficult_points: are accentuated by 是被动语态，表示影响被气候或土壤因素加剧。
which 紧接 soil acidification，通常指土壤酸化这一因素，而不是所有并列因素。

sentences.sentence: The second resolution concentrates on the need to preserve the genetic diversity of European forests.
sentences.translation: 第二项决议着重强调保护欧洲森林遗传多样性的必要性。

structure.text: the need to preserve the genetic diversity of European forests
to preserve the genetic diversity of European forests

difficult_points: concentrate on 后接名词 need；to preserve 说明 need 的具体内容。
genetic diversity of European forests 是保护的对象，不能理解成“森林的遗传保护”。

sentences.sentence: The aim is to reverse the decline in the number of tree species or at least to preserve the 'genetic material' of all of them.
sentences.translation: 目标是扭转树种数量下降的趋势，或者至少保存所有树种的“遗传材料”。

structure.text: to reverse the decline in the number of tree species
or at least to preserve the 'genetic material' of all of them

difficult_points: 两个 to 不定式由 or 并列，第二个 to preserve 是较低目标“至少保存”。
all of them 指所有树种，them 不能只指 genetic material。

sentences.sentence: Although forest fires do not affect all of Europe to the same extent, the amount of damage caused the experts to propose as the third resolution that the Strasbourg conference consider the establishment of a European databank on the subject.
sentences.translation: 虽然森林火灾对欧洲各地的影响程度不同，但造成的损失使专家提议将建立欧洲森林火灾数据库作为第三项决议，供斯特拉斯堡会议审议。

structure.text: Although forest fires do not affect all of Europe to the same extent
to propose as the third resolution
that the Strasbourg conference consider the establishment of a European databank on the subject

difficult_points: Although 从句让步说明火灾影响不均；主句中 damage caused 是过去分词后置修饰 damage。
cause + 人 + to do 表示“使专家提出”；propose 后的 that 从句用 consider 的原形，属虚拟式。

sentences.sentence: All information used in the development of national preventative policies would become generally available.
sentences.translation: 制定各国预防性政策时使用的所有信息，都将向公众普遍开放。

structure.text: All information used in the development of national preventative policies
used in the development of national preventative policies

difficult_points: used in... 是过去分词短语，修饰 information，等于 information which is used...。
would become 表示假设决议实施后的结果，available 作主语补语。

sentences.sentence: The subject of the fourth resolution discussed by the ministers was mountain forests.
sentences.translation: 部长们讨论的第四项决议主题是山地森林。

structure.text: The subject of the fourth resolution discussed by the ministers

difficult_points: discussed by the ministers 后置修饰 resolution，而不是 subject。
主语很长，核心是 The subject，谓语 was 后接 mountain forests 作补语。

sentences.sentence: In Europe, it is undoubtedly the mountain ecosystem which has changed most rapidly and is most at risk.
sentences.translation: 在欧洲，毫无疑问，变化最快、风险最大的正是山地生态系统。

structure.text: which has changed most rapidly and is most at risk

difficult_points: it is ... which ... 是强调句，强调对象是 the mountain ecosystem。
which 从句中 has changed 与 is at risk 并列，均修饰 ecosystem。

sentences.sentence: A thinly scattered permanent population and development of leisure activities, particularly skiing, have resulted in significant long-term changes to the local ecosystems.
sentences.translation: 分布稀疏的常住人口和休闲活动的发展，尤其是滑雪，已导致当地生态系统发生重大的长期变化。

structure.text: A thinly scattered permanent population and development of leisure activities
significant long-term changes to the local ecosystems

difficult_points: 主语由 population 和 development 并列构成，谓语用 have resulted。
thinly scattered 修饰 population；particularly skiing 是对 leisure activities 的插入补充。

sentences.sentence: Proposed developments include a preferential research program on mountain forests.
sentences.translation: 拟议的发展措施包括一项优先开展的山地森林研究计划。

structure.text: a preferential research program on mountain forests

difficult_points: Proposed 是过去分词作前置定语，意为“拟议的”，不是谓语。
on mountain forests 修饰 research program，说明研究对象。

sentences.sentence: The fifth resolution relaunched the European research network on the physiology of trees, called Eurosilva.
sentences.translation: 第五项决议重新启动了欧洲树木生理学研究网络，该网络名为Eurosilva。

structure.text: the European research network on the physiology of trees

difficult_points: relaunch 表示“重新启动”，network 是动作宾语。
called Eurosilva 是过去分词短语，补充说明 network 的名称。

sentences.sentence: Eurosilva should support joint European research on tree diseases and their physiological and biochemical aspects.
sentences.translation: Eurosilva 应支持欧洲在树木疾病及其生理和生化方面开展联合研究。

structure.text: joint European research on tree diseases and their physiological and biochemical aspects

difficult_points: should support 表示该网络承担的预期职责，不是过去时。
their 指 tree diseases；physiological and biochemical aspects 并列修饰 aspects。

sentences.sentence: Each country concerned could increase the number of scholarships and other financial support for doctoral theses and research projects in this area.
sentences.translation: 每个有关国家都可以增加奖学金数量，并为该领域的博士论文和研究项目提供更多财政支持。

structure.text: the number of scholarships and other financial support
for doctoral theses and research projects in this area

difficult_points: concerned 是后置过去分词，指“有关的国家”，不是“担忧的国家”。
increase 并列支配 scholarships 的数量和 financial support 两个内容。

sentences.sentence: Finally, the conference established the framework for a European research network on forest ecosystems.
sentences.translation: 最后，会议为欧洲森林生态系统研究网络建立了框架。

structure.text: the framework for a European research network on forest ecosystems

difficult_points: establish the framework for 表示“为……奠定框架”，不是建立实体网络本身。
on forest ecosystems 修饰 research network，说明研究领域。

sentences.sentence: This would also involve harmonising activities in individual countries as well as identifying a number of priority research topics relating to the protection of forests.
sentences.translation: 这还将包括协调各国的活动，并确定若干与森林保护有关的优先研究主题。

structure.text: as well as identifying a number of priority research topics
relating to the protection of forests

difficult_points: involve 后接两个并列动名词 harmonising 和 identifying。
relating to... 后置修饰 research topics，说明主题与森林保护的关系。

sentences.sentence: The Strasbourg conference's main concern was to provide for the future.
sentences.translation: 斯特拉斯堡会议最主要的关注点是为未来作好准备。
difficult_points: provide for the future 是固定表达，意为“为未来作准备”，不是“提供未来”。
conference's 是名词所有格，表示会议的主要关注点。

sentences.sentence: This was the initial motivation, one now shared by all 31 participants representing 31 European countries.
sentences.translation: 这就是最初的动机，如今31个代表31个欧洲国家的参与者都认同这一动机。

structure.text: one now shared by all 31 participants

difficult_points: one 是代词，指代前面的 motivation；shared by... 是省略关系代词的定语结构。
representing 31 European countries 修饰 participants，说明其代表关系。

sentences.sentence: Their final text commits them to on-going discussion between government representatives with responsibility for forests.
sentences.translation: 他们的最终文本承诺让各国继续进行由负责森林事务的政府代表参与的讨论。

structure.text: to on-going discussion between government representatives with responsibility for forests

difficult_points: commit someone to 后接名词或动名词，表示“使某人承诺做某事”；这里 to 是介词。
with responsibility for forests 修饰 government representatives，说明代表负责的事务。
